title: CVS Health, Teva Settle Florida State's Opioid-Related Claims: Report

title: CVS, drug makers settle Florida opioid lawsuit for $860M
text: CVS and pharmaceutical companies will pay Florida a combined $860 million as part of the settlement of an opioid epidemic case, state officials said Wednesday.

title: CVS Health reaches $484 million opioid settlement with Florida
text: CVS Health Corp said on Wednesday it had entered into an agreement with the state of Florida to resolve claims related toprescriptions for opioid medications for $484 million to be paid over a period of 18 years.

title: CVS settles Florida opioid claims for $484 million
text: CVS Health Corp. CVS, -3.11% announced Wednesday that it has settled opioid claims in Florida based on prescriptions filled in pharmacy locations in that state. Some of the claims date back more than 10 years.

title: CVS Health Reaches Opioid Settlement Agreement with State of Florida
text: WOONSOCKET, R.I. , March 30, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- CVS Health (NYSE: CVS) announced today that it has entered into an agreement with the State of Florida to resolve claims dating back more than a decade related to prescriptions for opioid medications that were filled at Florida CVS Pharmacy locations.

title: Next, Bridgepoint and CVS on Thursday's agenda as results tide slows
text: Thursday's announcements will be about Next PLC (LSE:NXT)'s full-year preliminary results and more importantly the immediate future with the clothing retailer having upped its full-year forecasts at the start of 2022. Profit before tax guidance was raised by £22mln to £822mln for the year to end January, but since then the squeeze on household income has tightened and how confident Next is of passing on higher materials cost is something to note.

title: CVS Aims To Be First Pharmacy in the Metaverse
text: CVS is joining retailers like Walmart and Nike in the metaverse. As CNBC reported Friday (March 4), the pharmacy giant has filed with the U.S. Patent Trade Office for a trademark to sell virtual goods and NTFs — and provide healthcare services — in the virtual world.

title: CVS files to trademark its pharmacy and health clinics in the metaverse
text: CVS Health looks to patent its stores as well as sales of virtual goods including prescription drugs, wellness, beauty and personal care products.

title: CVS, Walgreens, and Walmart part of Biden's test-to-treat COVID-19 program
text: CVS Health Corp., the Walgreens Boots Alliance Inc., and Walmart Inc. said they will participate in the test-to-treat initiative, a new program that allows someone who has tested positive for the virus to get antiviral pills during the same visit at no cost.
